name: tinyzkp
display_name: TinyZKP — Verifiable Receipts for AI Agents
description: Mint zero-knowledge proofs as a tool call. Six production templates (range, hash preimage, computation attestation, accumulator, policy compliance, data integrity). Free 100 proofs/month, no credit card.

tools.name: list_templates
tools.description: List all available proof templates with summaries and tags.

tools.name: describe_template
tools.description: Get the full parameter schema and cost category for a template.

tools.name: list_workloads
tools.description: List built-in named workloads (programs) suitable for the raw prover.

tools.name: get_capabilities
tools.description: Report server capabilities, supported transports, and tier limits.

tools.name: prove_template
tools.description: Submit a proof job using a named template (recommended path).

tools.name: prove_workload
tools.description: Submit a proof job using a named workload.

tools.name: poll_job
tools.description: Poll the status of a submitted prove job.

tools.name: verify_proof
tools.description: Verify a proof. Always free; never charges quota.

tools.name: get_proof
tools.description: Retrieve the proof bytes for a completed job.

tools.name: get_proof_summary
tools.description: Retrieve a compact summary (digest, sizes, timing) for a completed job.

remote.claude: claude mcp add --transport http tinyzkp https://mcp.tinyzkp.com

auth.notes: Public endpoint, capped by HC_MCP_MAX_INFLIGHT. Authenticated requests get per-plan rate limits matching the HTTP API ladder.
